name: STIVENELVRO LEGENDS
short_description: It is an adventure game, 2d platforms, where you control Stivenelvro, jump, turn, slide through different obstacles getting the keys that will unlock the legends and thus get more abilities. All this being guided by his friend GhostPower and his machine to teleport him to different worlds.
detailed_description:
Fly, run, jump and have fun between different obstacles in this 2D platform game through different worlds!

Get ready to meet the legends of the world of cubes.

Acquire new skills and don't forget to trust your friends, they will guide you through dangerous worlds and difficult obstacles.

Game Features:


-2D platforms
-Many different worlds
-Challenges of Legends
-Teleportation Dasher
-Extreme difficulty
